title: Protocol Labs: Verifiable Randomness and ZKPs with Yolan Romailler | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
Yolan Romailler, Applied Cryptographer at Randamu, shares insights from his work.

Drawing on experience from Black Hat, DEF CON, and Real World Crypto, this talk explores real-world cryptographic systems, secure implementation, and advances in threshold cryptography and distributed randomness.
